channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: 49ers report card: Niners lose McCaffrey, look overmatched amid 3-game skid
item.description: For as disjointed and dry as the 49ers are offensively, it's their run defense that has crushed their chances and led to road routs at Green Bay and now Buffalo.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's season 'potentially' over after knee injury in 49ers' loss to Bills
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mitchell scores 35, Cavs end Celtics' winning streak with 115-111 win in matchup of East's elite
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 20 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter as the Cleveland Cavaliers ended Boston's seven-game winning streak with a 115-111 victory over the Celtics on Sunday night in the second intense matchup between the Eastern Conference’s top teams this season.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Monahan with goal and assist, Blue Jackets extend points streak to 6 with 6-3 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Sean Monahan had a goal and assist, and the Columbus Blue Jackets extended their points streak to six games with a 6-3 win over the Chicago Blackhawks on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Philadelphia defense, Tucker's misses help the Eagles to a 24-19 win in their showdown with Ravens
item.description: Saquon Barkley scored on a 25-yard run with 7:56 remaining, and Philadelphia’s stingy defense kept Lamar Jackson mostly under control in a 24-19 victory over the Baltimore Ravens.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: The Big Ten Conference has announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference’s sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines’ win in Columbus.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Big Ten dishes out hefty fines to Michigan, Ohio State after postgame melee
item.description: The Big Ten Conference on Sunday announced $100,000 fines for Michigan and Ohio State after a massive brawl at the end of their rivalry game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Sam Darnold helps Vikings notch 10th win of season in victory over Cardinals
item.description: Minnesota Vikings quarterback Sam Darnold had a couple of clutch touchdown passes on Sunday as the team picked up win No. 10 of the season.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vikings win 5th straight, rallying past Cardinals 23-22 on Sam Darnold's TD pass with 1:13 left
item.description: Sam Darnold’s second touchdown pass of the second half went to Aaron Jones for Minnesota’s first lead with 1:13 left, and the Vikings rallied from 13 points down to beat the Arizona Cardinals 23-22 for their fifth straight victory.
item.dc:creator: Dave Campbell, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Purdue fires coach Ryan Walters after going 5-19 in his two seasons
item.description: Purdue hired Ryan Walters to keep a promising program near the top of the Big Ten Conference. Two years later, the Boilermakers have sunk to unprecedented depths — and Walters is out of a job.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Liverpool beats Man City 2-0 to move nine points clear in the Premier League
item.description: Liverpool is in control of the Premier League title race. Manchester City is in free fall. A 2-0 win against City on Sunday moved Liverpool nine points clear at the top of the standings and 11 ahead of Pep Guardiola’s four-time defending champion.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lou Carnesecca, Hall of Fame coach who led St. John's for 24 seasons, dies at 99
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — In the long and storied history of New York City basketball, nobody wore it quite like Lou Carnesecca. The excitable St.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jaxson Stauber shuts out Vegas in season debut, 6-0
item.description: LAS VEGAS (ABC4 Sports) - Jaxson Stauber made 29 saves for his first NHL shutout, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vegas Golden Knights 6-0 at T-Mobile Arena on Saturday. It was Stauber’s debut for Utah, his seventh NHL game and his first since Feb. 22, 2023, with the Chicago Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 17 Iowa St beats Wildcats 29-21 for first 10-win season, will play Sun Devils for Big 12 title
item.description: AMES, Iowa (AP) — Rocco Becht threw for two touchdowns and ran for another and No. 17 Iowa State's defense came up with big stops in the second half to help the Cyclones beat Kansas State 29-21 on a cold Saturday night for the first 10-win season in program history.
item.dc:creator: PAVLE MARKOVIC, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago hosts Dallas in Central Division play
item.description: Dallas Stars (13-7, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (7-12-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Wednesday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Dallas Stars visit the Chicago Blackhawks in a matchup within the Central Division Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blake Snell agrees to 5-year deal with Dodgers: reports
item.description: (KRON) -- After one year with the San Francisco Giants, star pitcher Blake Snell left for their biggest rival. Snell agreed to a five-year deal with the Los Angeles Dodgers on Wednesday, according to reports from ESPN, MLB.com and others. Snell is a two-time Cy Young award winner.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Sergachev scores in overtime in 3-2 Utah HC win
item.description: MONTREAL (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 27 seconds remaining in overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens at Bell Centre on Tuesday. Sergachev directed a Nick Schmaltz pass through the crease inside the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Giants looked terrible after emotionally draining week
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- There is no other way to cut it. The Giants' performance yesterday was putrid. They got embarrassed by the Bucs 30-7. Tommy DeVito got mocked by Tampa quarterback Baker Mayfield. Boo's rained down at MetLife Stadium. Effort was not there.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Bucs with Bowles looks back at dominating win over the Giants
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers returned from their bye week in dominating fashion with a 30-7 win over the New York Giants that ended a four-game losing streak and helped their playoff hopes in the process.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rays must decide fate of stadium deal by Dec. 1, Pinellas commission chair says
item.description: The Pinellas County Commission is seeking answers from the Tampa Bay Rays organization on its embattled stadium deal.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC
